content: I just wanna give a shoutout to this functionality within the Debian environment where I am now running Rust.....I am in my early stages of learning how call C from Rust. The (gdb) was immensely helpful when I hit a snag trying to create a C linker...having dropped the ball. Who else uses this functionality , apparently its immensely helpful
This sounds like a general question for Rust? These sort of questions are probably better asked at the Rust Users Forum or the Rust Language Discord.
